title: ollama/ollama
summary: Get up and running with Llama 3, Mistral, Gemma, and other large language models locally.

title: langchain-ai/langchain
summary: LangChain Ollama integration enables using Ollama-hosted models in LangChain chains and agents.

title: ollama-python
summary: Official Python SDK for Ollama: chat, generate, embed, pull, push, list, delete models.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript/TypeScript client for Ollama with full API coverage.

title: ollama-webui
summary: Feature-rich web UI for Ollama (formerly Ollama-WebUI). Chat-like interface, model management, RAG.

title: ollama-agents
summary: Lightweight framework for building autonomous agents that use Ollama models.

title: ollama-docker
summary: Official Docker images for Ollama server and GPU-enabled containers.

title: ollama-cli
summary: Cross-platform CLI tool to pull, run, and manage models from the terminal.

title: ollama-helm
summary: Helm chart to deploy Ollama on Kubernetes with GPU & persistent storage.

title: ollama-rag
summary: Simple RAG pipeline using Ollama embeddings + Chroma vector store for document Q&A.

title: ollama-copilot
summary: VS Code extension that turns Ollama models into a local GitHub Copilot.

title: ollama-discord-bot
summary: Discord bot that serves Ollama models in chat channels with slash commands.

title: ollama-slack
summary: Slack bot integration for Ollama with streaming replies and thread support.

title: ollama-obsidian
summary: Obsidian plugin to generate text with local Ollama models inside notes.

title: ollama-nvim
summary: Neovim plugin to run and chat with Ollama models inside the editor.

title: ollama-macos-menu
summary: macOS menu-bar app to start/stop Ollama and switch models from the toolbar.

title: ollama-rust
summary: Community-maintained Rust crate for interacting with the Ollama API.

title: ollama-go
summary: Unofficial Go client library for Ollama with generate/chat/embed endpoints.
